title: AgriReliabilityBench: Reproducible reliability benchmarking for crop-weed visual perception under dataset shift
description: Code, configurations, derived result tables, figures, supplementary materials, and reproducibility scripts accompanying the agricultural crop-weed visual reliability benchmark.
